structured_content.response:
The process `J09A` has been executed according to its definition:

- Created working tables, applied all ENTSCHEIDUNG rules, and joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `EABL`.
- Applied the sales-vs-net preference logic and flagged `MANDATORY_READING` records based on 2023/2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” criteria.
- Exported:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (666 rows) and sent it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09A.csv` (20,200 rows, excluding mandatory readings) and sent it to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Deleted the temporary table `J09A_temp`.

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or sample rows from either CSV.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09A` has been executed successfully. Summary of what was done:

- Built working tables, applied all `ENTSCHEIDUNG` rules, and joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `EABL`.
- Applied sales-vs-net preference logic and flagged `MANDATORY_READING` records using the 2023/2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” criteria.
- Exported and sent:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (666 rows) to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
  - `J09A.csv` (20,200 rows, excluding mandatory readings) to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Dropped temporary table `J09A_temp`.

Tell me if you want the exact SQL, the full rule definition, or sample rows from either CSV.
